sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 3.60 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.3)

statement.latex: The notion of the$p 0.2ex$-length\/ of an arbitrary finite group was introduced in (L.\,A.\,Shemetkov, Math. USSR Sbornik, 1 (1968), 83--92). Investigate the relations between the$p 0.2ex$-length of a finite group and the invariants$c_p$,$d_p$,$e_p$of its Sylow$p 0.2ex$-sub\-group. {4th Issue (1973)} ~ { Problems from the 4th Issue (1973)}

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
